Description

If you want to be successful traders on Forex, Crypto or stock market, you need to go have below knowledge




1. PLAN : The right trading mindsets - reasonable target - a suitable strategy - the method to learn and practice effectively


2. DO : Learning a trading system that you feel it is logical, easy to understand that you can earn profit from the first trades
before learn and practice deeper


3. Correction : Focus to back-testing to understand that strategy more detail and make it become your own system, forward-testing to improve your risk management skills on the real market and control emotion also


4. Action : Start live trading with small captial and enhance it slowly and slowly




This procees can be repeated 2 times, 3 times and even 100 times like me during 5 years. I wasted so much time and effort to learn and practice before I really create my own trading system - New concept Intergrations (NCI). It is just because I don't have a right PLAN before I start. It likes that I go to the new place without any MAP as Google Map or Apple Map

That's why I would like to share to you the PLAN within 2 hours course

For serious traders only, You also can join NCI learning school to enhance your profitable and consistency level in trading.
That you're able to manage big funded accounts from top funded companies now


- Level 0 : Multiple timeframe theory, connect from zone to zone

- Level 1 : Complete Key level strategy, drawing key level exactly

- Level 2 : Complete Smart Money Concepts, understanding the real market picture with manipulation

- Level 3 : How to combine Key level and smart money concepts with market cycle theory and Volume

- Level 4 : Using Key level and smart money for day trading, build the road to be success trader, update market structure

- Level 5 : For investing trader, Using Ichimoku to multiple assets and using Golden trend indicator to manage 100 assets


Btw, I also created a Discord channel for students to discuss together. In this channel, we will share the knowledge, tips to learn and analyzation every week on any assets

I also created a Competition that will help learn facing with yourself to improve your psychology, risk management on high pressure environment like real trading

All of above activities would help you to come profitable and consistency traders in near future




You can join discord channel to refer about it anytime

If you're SERIOUS TRADER who are ready to be DIFFIRENT this year. Let's start from today

NOW or NEVER !

We will FIGHT TOGETHER for a SUCCESS YEAR

Who this course is for:
Completely new traders who want to be success in the short time to quite office job.
Exprience traders who still are struggling with trading without profit

MY PAINFUL ROAD TO THE TRADING CAREER and TOP 1% Trader


This posts will be long, but if you spend time to read. It definitely help you.

------------------------ My trading journey ------------------------

There're somes sharing that haunted in my head every night.

We were NOT born with "a SILVER Spoon in mouth".

" If your 20 years old is poor, That's Normal.
If your 27 years old is still poor, I can sympathize;
If your 30 years old is still poor, you're really incompetent."

We cannot choose where will we born ?
But we can choose where we will die and how will we live.

So I decided to find a way for my life when I am learning in the top University of my country.

Trading journey really start after I joined a meeting about Crypto on 2015.

The reason why I joined that meeting even I have never heard about it before because I want to find the ROAD for my LIFE. I cannot work as officier 8-5 with 500$ per month That's quite high salary for an engineer on my country that time.

I feel that it is so terrible LIFE if I just live like that. A normal car on my country worth is 50,000$ at least.
A normal house is around 150,000$. Totally, 200,000$ and I need to works 400 YEARS.
That thoughts gave me the power to EXIT and find the new ROAD. I learnt so hard and work so hard.

I read so many books about trading that I don't even remember the numbers now : Price action (AL Boooks), RSI, VSA, MACD, Elliot,Wyckoff, Forex 100, Forex 101, Trend line, Support resistance, Somes books of Jess livemore, Mark minervini , William o'neil, ..... so many courses as well,

I wish I can earn money that equal to my salary before only (500$) but I have more time.
It means that I WIN about times to have more chance to develop.

I tried and tried and tried again so many years but I all FAILED . I cannot figure out the reason why, I just know I am very near my target but I cannot reach to it even 1 time.
Luckily, I never give up.... I came to the DEAD CYCLE that I shared you before.

Deadcycle mean that I just SEARCH new strategy --> Try --> Fail --> Search again Until I realize a problem that I still stand up at the START POINT after many years, I feel so terrible.

So stressful. Even 2:00 AM,  I still works to find my problem. I feel that " Profit is very near, try hard, just a little" . But, it has never came.

------------------------ "My turning point" ------------------------

Until one day, that's around 2018 Dec. I meet a trader in an other Meeting who changed my life completely.
He taught me about Key level strategy. It is very simple about key level and trend and entry with Confluence trend. I said" WOW. My holy grail here".
I see the logical, I see the results.

But when I practice after 4 months, results are just break even. Sometimes I have profit , sometimes I lost but If I got a losing streak, I need 2 months to pull back the performance. I drop to hole one more time. I feel so stressful again, but.

I still trust this strategy, I don't change it because my 1 day mentor manage 1m$ that time with really nice profit with strategy.


I think here is the TURNING POINT that help me have big improvement like today. I don't change the strategy and avoid the DEAD CYCLE to start again one more time.

I TRUST IT and decide to DEVELOP it by backtesting. I spend 2 months to practice to define correctly market structure with hundred of cases with pullback. Give out the final standard for PULLBACK, BREAK OUT.
And then, Market cycle, multiple timeframe, Unconfluence strategy, Smart Money Concepts came with me after back-testing thousands time and apply them to live trading to confirm again. They worked for me. I really found my own system from the cornerstone that one-day-mentor gave me.

I developed a strategy from very basic knowledge to the full view with market - My NCI trading system was borned. I call it as New Concept Intergration because I want to respect my one-day-member even a small sharing but he helped me to save a lot of time and effort on this career.

We all need a mentor to guide us to see the LIGHT.

I earned profit with it at the first time. The 2nd time and 3rd time that I can WITHDRAWN the money.

I scream " I can do it, I finally do it" even it just a little money  at the first time.

Now, I manage big big account and continue expanding my capital more with bigger profit but I still really respect the support from mentor and my effort in the past.

Everyone must do better than me !! I am here to help you save time and money than me before.

Never give up - Key mindset to be success

Trading is a PROCESS , It takes time to go to the TOP.
If I give up, I still a normal Engineer with salary 500$ per month.
If I give up, I cannot earn 150,00$ or 250,000$ or more per month.

Don't hesitate more, Let's FIGHT for a BETTER FUTURE , Now or NEVER.

-------------------------------------Recap---------------------------------------
-Full name : Jayce Pham
- Founder & CEO  NCI trading system

- Top #4 Trading competition 2022 - CTI Funds (England funds)
- Top #7 FTMO LEADERBOARD 06/2024

-Current job :

     CEO NCI Trading - New concepts Intergration

     Professional trader at FTMO,CTI, TFT, TCF, MFF, The5%,...

     Manage at Expert Advisor trading team

- Trading styles : Swing-scalping switching, Investing

- Invested assets : Forex , Cryptocurrency, Stocks

- Start professional trading career: 2015

@supports not (-ms-high-contrast: none) {
/* Flexbox has major bugs on ie11, so we only want to target non-ie11 browsers for custom styles for now */

  /* Container styles */
  #onetrust-banner-sdk {
    max-width: 960px;
    margin: 0px auto;
    box-shadow: none;
  }

  #onetrust-consent-sdk #onetrust-banner-sdk {
    padding: 16px;
    background-color: transparent;
  }

  #onetrust-banner-sdk .ot-sdk-container {
    border-radius: 0px;
    border: 1px solid white;
    background-color: #1C1D1F;
    box-shadow: 0 4px 8px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.08), 0 4px 12px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.24);
    padding: 24px;
    width: 100%;
  }

  #onetrust-banner-sdk .ot-sdk-row {
    display: flex;
  }

  @media screen and (max-width: 600px) {
    #onetrust-banner-sdk .ot-sdk-row {
      flex-direction: column;
    }
  }

  /* Column styles */
  #onetrust-banner-sdk .ot-sdk-columns {
    float: initial;
  }

  /* Policy text container styles */
  #onetrust-banner-sdk:not(.ot-iab-2) #onetrust-group-container {
    width: auto;
  }

  @media screen and (min-width: 601px) {
    #onetrust-banner-sdk #onetrust-policy {
      margin: 0 8px 0 0;
    }
  }

  @media screen and (max-width: 600px) {
    #onetrust-banner-sdk #onetrust-policy {
      margin: 0 0 16px 0;
    }
  }

  /* Policy text styles */
  #onetrust-banner-sdk p, #onetrust-pc-sdk p, #ot-sdk-cookie-policy p {
    margin: 0;
    font-size: .88em !important;
  }

  /* Button container styles */
  #onetrust-banner-sdk:not(.ot-iab-2).vertical-align-content #onetrust-button-group-parent {
    position: initial;
    left: initial;
    top: initial;
    transform: initial;
    width: auto;
  }

  #onetrust-banner-sdk #onetrust-button-group-parent {
    padding: 0;
    margin: 0;
    min-width: auto;
    width: auto;
  }

  #onetrust-banner-sdk #onetrust-button-group{
    padding: 0;
    margin: 0;
    width: auto;
    text-align: initial;
    display: flex;
  }

  /* Button styles */
  #onetrust-banner-sdk #onetrust-button-group button,
  #onetrust-banner-sdk #onetrust-button-group button:last-of-type {
    font-size: .88em !important;
    padding: 0;
    margin: 0;
  }

  #onetrust-banner-sdk #onetrust-accept-btn-handler, #onetrust-banner-sdk #onetrust-pc-btn-handler {
    padding: 0;
    margin: 0;
    min-height: 40px;
    padding: 12px 8px;
  }

  @media screen and (max-width: 600px) {
    #onetrust-banner-sdk #onetrust-accept-btn-handler, #onetrust-consent-sdk #onetrust-reject-all-handler, #onetrust-banner-sdk #onetrust-pc-btn-handler {
      width: 50%;
      min-width: auto;
      max-width: auto;
      text-align: center;
    }
  }

  @media screen and (min-width: 601px) {
    #onetrust-banner-sdk #onetrust-accept-btn-handler, #onetrust-consent-sdk #onetrust-reject-all-handler, #onetrust-banner-sdk #onetrust-pc-btn-handler {
      width: 140px;
      max-width: 140px;
      min-width: 140px;
    }
  }

  @media only screen and (min-width: 426px) and (max-width: 896px) {
    #onetrust-banner-sdk .has-reject-all-button #onetrust-pc-btn-handler.cookie-setting-link {
      text-align: center !important;
    }
  }  

  #onetrust-consent-sdk #onetrust-pc-btn-handler, #onetrust-consent-sdk #onetrust-pc-btn-handler.cookie-setting-link{
    border: 1px solid white;
    text-decoration: none;
    margin-right: 8px !important;
  }

  #onetrust-consent-sdk #onetrust-reject-all-handler {margin-right: 8px !important;}
  #onetrust-consent-sdk #onetrust-accept-btn-handler {margin-right: 8px !important;}

  #onetrust-banner-sdk #onetrust-close-btn-container {
    display: none;
  }

  /* filter cookie button fix (568) */
  #onetrust-pc-sdk .ot-fltr-btns {padding-top:10px;}

  /* opt-out signal */
  #onetrust-group-container .ot-optout-signal {border:none; background-color: none; color:black;}
.ot-optout-signal span {color:black;}

            .ot-floating-button__front{background-image:url('https://cdn.cookielaw.org/logos/static/ot_persistent_cookie_icon.png')}</style><script src="https://frontends.udemycdn.com/frontends-course-landing-page/_next/static/chunks/67c5548cc8e3d1a7.js"></script><script src="https://frontends.udemycdn.com/frontends-course-landing-page/_next/static/chunks/52fdebf6d7afe5aa.js"></script><script src="https://frontends.udemycdn.com/frontends-course-landing-page/_next/static/chunks/d05098a2b55de9a0.js"></script><script src="https://cdn.amplitude.com/engagement-browser/prod/split/index.js" id="engagement-sdk-bundle" type="module"></script><style>#engagement-wrapper *,
#engagement-wrapper *:before,
#engagement-wrapper *:after,
.engagement-card-portal-container *,
.engagement-card-portal-container *:before,
.engagement-card-portal-container *:after,
.engagement-nudge-modal *,
.engagement-nudge-modal *:before,
.engagement-nudge-modal *:after,
.engagement-nudge-modal-mock *,
.engagement-nudge-modal-mock *:before,
.engagement-nudge-modal-mock *:after {
  box-sizing: border-box;
}

.engagement-modal > .rc-dialog > .rc-dialog-content {
  background-color: transparent;
}

.rc-dialog.amplitude-engagement-modal-body {
  margin-top: 0;
  margin-bottom: 0;
}

.engagement-tooltip {
  z-index: 2147483647 !important; /*make the tooltip the highest possible z index*/
}

/*** Hack: Hide this because it's less flexible (classnames can't be changes)
    Instead we only show its children, by translating its children ***/
.engagement-modal > .rc-dialog > .rc-dialog-content > .rc-dialog-header {
  max-height: 0px !important;
  padding: 0px !important;
}

.engagement-modal > .rc-dialog {
  left: 0px;
  transition: left 0.3s;
}

.engagement-modal > .rc-dialog > .rc-dialog-content > .rc-dialog-body {
  position: relative !important;
}

/* TestMode inline engagement */
.engagement-modal-inline.rc-dialog-wrap {
  position: relative;
  height: 100%;
}

[id^='engagement-toast-container'] {
  inset: 16px;
  @media (max-width: 400px) {
    inset: 8px;
  }
}

[id^='engagement-toast-responsive-inner-div'] {
  @media (max-width: 400px) {
    width: 100%;
  }
}

[id^='engagement-container'] > div {
  height: 100%;
}

#engagement-home > .rc-dialog-root {
  height: 100%;
}

#engagement-wrapper .rc-header-guidance {
  background: rgba(174, 177, 221, 1) !important;
  filter: brightness(135%);
  border-radius: 2px 2px 0px 0px !important;
  border-bottom: 0px !important;
  padding: 8px 30px 2px 30px !important;
  margin: 0px 10px 0px 10px;
  box-shadow: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.15) 0px 3px 10px !important;
  font-weight: 400;
  text-align: center;
}

@keyframes fontbulger {
  0% {
    font-size: 10px;
  }
  30% {
    font-size: 15px;
  }
  100% {
    font-size: 12px;
  }
}

@keyframes shimmer {
  0% {
    background-position: top left;
  }
  100% {
    background-position: top right;
  }
}

.engagement-category-collapse {
  transform: scale(1, -1);
  transition: 0.3s ease-in;
  cursor: pointer;
}

.engagement-category-expand {
  transition: 0.3s ease-in;
  cursor: pointer;
}

/* Nudges - modal */

.engagement-nudge-modal {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
  z-index: 2147483644 !important;
}

.engagement-nudge-modal-mock {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
  margin-right: 0;
  transition: margin-right cubic-bezier(0.78, 0.14, 0.15, 0.86) 0.3s;
  z-index: 2147483644 !important;
}

/* Nudges - media */

.engagement-help-doc-title::before {
  position: absolute;
  top: 0;
  left: 0;
  width: 100%;
  height: 100%;
  background: linear-gradient(180deg, transparent 66.67%, gray 93.08%);
  content: '';
}

/* Recorder */
#engagement-recorder-mask {
  background: transparent;
}
</style><style>/*** Guidance banner styling and animation ***/
@keyframes example {
  from {
    transform: translateY(0px);
  }
  to {
    transform: translateY(-30px);
  }
}

.rc-header-guidance {
  animation: example 0.5s;
  animation-fill-mode: forwards;
}

/*** engagement entry animation ***/
/*** We can't do exit animation because rc-dialog makes display: none ***/
@keyframes onEntry {
  0% {
    opacity: 0.3;
  }
  100% {
    opacity: 1;
  }
}

.engagement-opened {
  animation: onEntry 0.1s;
  animation-fill-mode: forwards;
}

@keyframes onSelect {
  0% {
    transform: translate3d(0px, 0px, 0px);
  }
  50% {
    transform: translate3d(0px, 0px, -0.5px);
  }
  100% {
    transform: translate3d(0px, 0px, 0px);
  }
}

.engagement-selected {
  animation: onSelect 0.4s;
}

@keyframes ScaleEntry {
  from {
    transform: scale(0.8);
    opacity: 0;
  }
  to {
    transform: scale(1);
    opacity: 1;
  }
}

.engagement-scale-entry-animation {
  animation: ScaleEntry 0.3s;
  animation-fill-mode: forwards;
}

@keyframes onEntry {
  0% {
    opacity: 0.3;
  }
  100% {
    opacity: 1;
  }
}

.engagement-shortcut-tooltip {
  opacity: 0;
  animation: tagEntry 0.2s;
  animation-delay: 0.5s;
  animation-fill-mode: forwards;
}

@keyframes tagExit {
  from {
    transform: scale(1);
    opacity: 1;
  }
  to {
    transform: scale(0.8);
    opacity: 0;
  }
}

.engagement-shortcut-tooltip-remove {
  animation: tagExit 0.2s;
  animation-fill-mode: forwards;
}

.engagement-shortcut-tooltip,
.engagement-shortcut-tooltip-remove {
  z-index: 99999999;
  position: absolute;
  padding: 8px 12px;
  background-color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.8);
  font-family: proxima-nova, sans-serif;
  color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.6);
  border-radius: 4px;
  font-size: 13px;
}

.engagement-shortcut-tooltip-tag {
  margin-left: 10px;
  padding: 2px 5px;
  border-radius: 2px;
  background-color: grey;
}

#engagement-launcher {
  animation: 0.25s ease-out scaleIn;
}

@keyframes scaleIn {
  0% {
    transform: scale(0.06);
  }
  100% {
    transform: scale(1);
  }
}

@keyframes growFromBottom {
  0% {
    transform: scale(1, 0.3);
  }

  100% {
    transform: scale(1, 1);
  }
}
</style><style>.rc-dialog {
  position: relative;
  width: auto;
  margin: 10px;
}
.rc-dialog-wrap {
  position: fixed;
  overflow: auto;
  top: 0;
  right: 0;
  bottom: 0;
  left: 0;
  z-index: 1050;
  -webkit-overflow-scrolling: touch;
  outline: 0;
}
.rc-dialog-title {
  margin: 0;
  font-size: 14px;
  line-height: 21px;
  font-weight: bold;
}
.rc-dialog-content {
  position: relative;
  background-color: #ffffff;
  border: none;
  border-radius: 6px 6px;
  background-clip: padding-box;
}
.rc-dialog-close {
  cursor: pointer;
  border: 0;
  background: transparent;
  font-size: 21px;
  position: absolute;
  right: 20px;
  top: 12px;
  font-weight: 700;
  line-height: 1;
  color: #000;
  text-shadow: 0 1px 0 #fff;
  filter: alpha(opacity=20);
  opacity: 0.2;
  text-decoration: none;
}
.rc-dialog-close:disabled {
  pointer-events: none;
}
.rc-dialog-close-x:after {
  content: '×';
}
.rc-dialog-close:hover {
  opacity: 1;
  filter: alpha(opacity=100);
  text-decoration: none;
}
.rc-dialog-header {
  padding: 13px 20px 14px 20px;

data-purpose="safely-set-inner-html:description:description" data-testid="safely-set-inner-html:description:description"><p>If you want to be successful traders on Forex, Crypto or stock market, you need to go have below knowledge</p><p><br></p><p> <strong>1. PLAN :</strong> The right trading mindsets - reasonable target - a suitable strategy - the method to learn and practice effectively<br></p><p> <strong>2. DO : </strong>Learning a trading system that you feel it is logical, easy to understand that you can earn profit from the first trades <br>before learn and practice deeper<br></p><p> <strong>3. Correction : </strong>Focus to back-testing to understand that strategy more detail and make it become your own system, forward-testing to improve your risk management skills on the real market and control emotion also<br></p><p> <strong>4. Action : </strong>Start live trading with small captial and enhance it slowly and slowly</p><p><br></p><p> This procees can be repeated 2 times, 3 times and even 100 times like me during 5 years. I wasted so much time and effort to learn and practice before I really create my own trading system - New concept Intergrations (NCI). It is just because I don't have a right PLAN before I start. It likes that I go to the new place without any MAP as Google Map or Apple Map</p><p> That's why I would like to share to you the PLAN within 2 hours course<br><br>For serious traders only, You also can join NCI learning school to enhance your profitable and consistency level in trading. <br>That you're able to manage big funded accounts from top funded companies now<br></p><p>- Level 0 : Multiple timeframe theory, connect from zone to zone</p><p>- Level 1 : Complete Key level strategy, drawing key level exactly</p><p>- Level 2 : Complete Smart Money Concepts, understanding the real market picture with manipulation</p><p>- Level 3 : How to combine Key level and smart money concepts with market cycle theory and Volume</p><p>- Level 4 : Using Key level and smart money for day trading, build the road to be success trader, update market structure</p><p>- Level 5 : For investing trader, Using Ichimoku to multiple assets and using Golden trend indicator to manage 100 assets</p><p><br>Btw, I also created a Discord channel for students to discuss together. In this channel, we will share the knowledge, tips to learn and analyzation every week on any assets</p><p><strong>I also created a Competition</strong> that will help learn facing with yourself to improve your psychology, risk management on high pressure environment like real trading</p><p>All of above activities would <strong>help you to come profitable and consistency traders</strong> in near future</p><p><br></p><p>You can join discord channel to refer about it anytime</p><p>If you're SERIOUS TRADER who are ready to be DIFFIRENT this year. data-testid="description-content"><p><strong>MY PAINFUL ROAD TO THE TRADING CAREER and TOP 1% Trader<br></strong></p><p>This posts will be long, but if you spend time to read. It definitely help you.</p><p>------------------------ My trading journey ------------------------ <br><br>There're somes sharing that haunted in my head every night. <br><br><strong><em>We were NOT born with "a SILVER Spoon in mouth". </em><br><br></strong><em>" If your 20 years old is poor, That's Normal. <br>If your 27 years old is still poor, I can sympathize; <br>If your 30 years old is still poor, you're really incompetent."<br><br>We cannot choose where will we born ? <br>But we can choose where we will die and how will we live. </em><br><br>So I decided to find a way for my life when I am learning in the top University of my country. <br><br><strong>Trading journey really start after I joined a meeting about Crypto on 2015. </strong><br><br>The reason why I joined that meeting even I have never heard about it before because I want to find the ROAD for my LIFE. I cannot work as officier 8-5 with 500$ per month That's quite high salary for an engineer on my country that time.<br><br>I feel that it is so terrible LIFE if I just live like that. A normal car on my country worth is 50,000$ at least. <br>A normal house is around 150,000$. Totally, 200,000$ and I need to works 400 YEARS.<br>That thoughts gave me the power to EXIT and find the new ROAD. I learnt so hard and work so hard.<br><br>I read so many books about trading that I don't even remember the numbers now : Price action (AL Boooks), RSI, VSA, MACD, Elliot,Wyckoff, Forex 100, Forex 101, Trend line, Support resistance, Somes books of Jess livemore, Mark minervini , William o'neil, ..... so many courses as well, <br><br>I wish I can earn money that equal to my salary before only (500$) but I have more time.<br>It means that I WIN about times to have more chance to develop. <br><br><strong>I tried and tried and tried again so many years but I all FAILED . </strong>I cannot figure out the reason why, I just know I am very near my target but I cannot reach to it even 1 time. <br>Luckily, I never give up.... I came to the DEAD CYCLE that I shared you before. <br><br>Deadcycle mean that I just SEARCH new strategy --> Try --> Fail --> Search again Until I realize a problem that I still stand up at the START POINT after many years, I feel so terrible.<br><br>So stressful. Even 2:00 AM,  I still works to find my problem. I feel that " Profit is very near, try hard, just a little" . But, it has never came. <br><br><strong>------------------------ "My turning point" ------------------------ </strong><br><br>Until one day, that's around 2018 Dec. I meet a trader in an other Meeting who changed my life completely. <br>He taught me about Key level strategy. It is very simple about key level and trend and entry with Confluence trend. I said" WOW. My holy grail here". <br>I see the logical, I see the results. <br><br>But when I practice after 4 months, results are just break even. Sometimes I have profit , sometimes I lost but If I got a losing streak, I need 2 months to pull back the performance. I drop to hole one more time. I feel so stressful again, but.<br><br><strong>I still trust this strategy, I don't change it because my 1 day mentor manage 1m$ that time with really nice profit with strategy</strong>. <br></p><p>I think here is the TURNING POINT that help me have big improvement like today. I don't change the strategy and avoid the DEAD CYCLE to start again one more time. <br><br>I TRUST IT and decide to DEVELOP it by backtesting. I spend 2 months to practice to define correctly market structure with hundred of cases with pullback. Give out the final standard for PULLBACK, BREAK OUT. <br>And then, Market cycle, multiple timeframe, Unconfluence strategy, Smart Money Concepts came with me after back-testing thousands time and apply them to live trading to confirm again. They worked for me. I really found my own system from the cornerstone that one-day-mentor gave me.<br><br><strong>I developed a strategy from very basic knowledge to the full view with market - My NCI trading system was borned. </strong>I call it as New Concept Intergration because I want to respect my one-day-member even a small sharing but he helped me to save a lot of time and effort on this career. <br><br>We all need a mentor to guide us to see the LIGHT. <br><br>I earned profit with it at the first time. The 2nd time and 3rd time that I can WITHDRAWN the money. <br><br>I scream " I can do it, I finally do it" even it just a little money  at the first time. <br><br>Now, I manage big big account and continue expanding my capital more with bigger profit but I still really respect the support from mentor and my effort in the past. <br><br><strong>Everyone must do better than me !! I am here to help you save time and money than me before.</strong><br><br><strong>Never give up - Key mindset to be success<br><br></strong>Trading is a PROCESS , It takes time to go to the TOP. <br>If I give up, I still a normal Engineer with salary 500$ per month. <br>If I give up, I cannot earn 150,00$ or 250,000$ or more per month. <br><br>Don't hesitate more, Let's FIGHT for a BETTER FUTURE , Now or NEVER.<br><br>-------------------------------------Recap---------------------------------------<br>-Full name : Jayce Pham <br>- Founder & CEO  NCI trading system</p><p><strong>- Top #4 Trading competition 2022 - CTI Funds (England funds)<br>- Top #7 FTMO LEADERBOARD 06/2024</strong></p><p>-Current job : </p><p>     CEO NCI Trading - New concepts Intergration</p><p>     Professional trader at FTMO,CTI, TFT, TCF, MFF, The5%,...</p><p>     Manage at Expert Advisor trading team </p><p>- Trading styles : Swing-scalping switching, Investing</p><p>-
